center.name: 瓜达洛普山脉
center.summary: 瓜达洛普山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Hutton's vireo，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | pages =435–436 }} There are also records inland from the species' core range from British Columbia south to Nevada and California and east to the Guadalupe Mountains in far western Texas. Hutton's vireo inhabits a variety of landscapes in the subtropical and temperate zones. The "Pacific" subspecies are mostly found in evergreen forest of both conifer and live oak types
